mapper.sql: upload_id, space_id, parent_id, name, size_bytes, mime_type, object_id, version_id, oss_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, expires_at, completed_at, completed_entry_id
mapper.insert: insert into drive_upload( upload_id, space_id, parent_id, name, size_bytes, mime_type, object_id, version_id, oss_session_id, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, expires_at, completed_at, completed_entry_id ) values( #{uploadId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{spaceId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{name}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{objectId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{ossSessionId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{status}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{completedAt}, #{completedEntryId, jdbcType=BINARY} )
